revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月10日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 10일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月初十]][[zh:六月初十]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月10日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 10일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月初十]][[zh:六月初十]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月10日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 10일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月初十]][[zh:六月初十]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月10日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 10일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月初十]][[zh:六月初十]]
{{Not to be confused with|June 10|qq=June 10}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=六月初十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 6월 10일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar June|qq=}} '''June 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|June (Lunisolar)|ja|6月 (旧暦)|lt=June (Minazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 6th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * Year 14 of {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|July 7|en|July 7|qid=Q2694|lt=July 7|1=July 7}} , {{ill|1843|en|1843|qid=Q7629|lt=1843|1=1843}} ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ordered town magistrate {{ill|Torii Yōzō|ja|鳥居耀蔵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Torii Yōzō|1=Torii Yōzō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10729521}} to begin reclamation efforts on {{ill|Inbanuma|ja|印旛沼|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inbanuma|qq=}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 25|en|July 25|qid=Q2720|lt=July 25|1=July 25}} , {{ill|1863|en|1863|qid=Q7701|lt=1863|1=1863}} ) – Representatives of France, Britain, the United States, and the Netherlands met in Yokohama and resolved to attack {{ill|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|ja|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōshū Domain|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q876267}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 11|en|July 11|qid=Q2701|lt=July 11|1=July 11}} , {{ill|1867|en|1867|qid=Q7715|lt=1867|1=1867}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|en|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|qid=Q287657|lt=Tokugawa Yoshinobu|1=Tokugawa Yoshinobu}} officially made the {{ill|Shinsengumi|en|Shinsengumi|qid=Q221031|lt=Shinsengumi|1=Shinsengumi}} retainers of the shogunate.
== Births == * Year 1 of [[Kangen]]{{efn|February 1243 to February 1247|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Julian calendar {{ill|June 28|en|June 28|qid=Q2660|lt=June 28|1=June 28}} , {{ill|1243|en|1243|qid=Q5438|lt=1243|1=1243}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Fukakusa|en|Emperor Go-Fukakusa|qid=Q349246|lt=Emperor Go-Fukakusa|1=Emperor Go-Fukakusa}} , 89th emperor of Japan (d. {{ill|1304|en|1304|qid=Q5619|lt=1304|1=1304}} ) * Year 5 of {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|qid=Q1192913|lt=Kanei|1=Kan'ei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 11|en|July 11|qid=Q2701|lt=July 11|1=July 11}} , {{ill|1628|en|1628|qid=Q6840|lt=1628|1=1628}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Mitsukuni|en|Tokugawa Mitsukuni|qid=Q1194944|lt=Tokugawa Mitsukuni|1=Tokugawa Mitsukuni}} (also known as {{ill|Mito Kōmon|ja|水戸黄門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mito Kōmon|1=stories of Mito Kōmon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11129919}} ), 2nd lord of {{ill|Mito Domain|en|Mito Domain|qid=Q1146904|lt=Mito Domain|1=Mito Domain}} (d. {{ill|1700|en|1700|qid=Q6813|lt=1700|1=1700}} ) * Year 6 of {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1193910}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 14|en|July 14|qid=Q2691|lt=July 14|1=July 14}} , {{ill|1777|en|1777|qid=Q7709|lt=1777|1=1777}} ) – {{ill|Tanomura Chikuden|en|Tanomura Chikuden|qid=Q1358543|lt=Tanomura Chikuden|1=Tanomura Chikuden}} , painter of the {{ill|Nanga (Japanese painting)|en|Nanga (Japanese painting)|qid=Q2928221|lt=Nanga|1=Nanga (Japanese painting)}} school (d. {{ill|1835|en|1835|qid=Q7597|lt=1835|1=1835}} ) * Year 7 of {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 23|en|July 23|qid=Q2722|lt=July 23|1=July 23}} , {{ill|1836|en|1836|qid=Q7601|lt=1836|1=1836}} ) – {{ill|Yamaoka Tesshū|en|Yamaoka Tesshū|qid=Q1158894|lt=Yamaoka Tesshū|1=Yamaoka Tesshū}} , shogunate retainer (d. {{ill|1888|en|1888|qid=Q7829|lt=1888|1=1888}} ) * Year 9 of {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 30|en|July 30|qid=Q2716|lt=July 30|1=July 30}} , {{ill|1838|en|1838|qid=Q7612|lt=1838|1=1838}} ) – {{ill|Murata Tsuneyoshi|en|Murata Tsuneyoshi|qid=Q11523495|lt=Murata Tsuneyoshi|1=Murata Tsuneyoshi}} , army officer and developer of the {{ill|Murata rifle|en|Murata rifle|qid=Q4346802|lt=Murata rifle|1=Murata rifle}} (d. {{ill|1921|en|1921|qid=Q2162|lt=1921|1=1921}} ) * Year 11 of {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 8|en|July 8|qid=Q2692|lt=July 8|1=July 8}} , {{ill|1840|en|1840|qid=Q7619|lt=1840|1=1840}} ) – {{ill|Iwamura Michitoshi|en|Iwamura Michitoshi|qid=Q3156395|lt=Iwamura Michitoshi|1=Iwamura Michitoshi}} , politician (d. {{ill|1914|en|1914|qid=Q2083|lt=1914|1=1914}} )
== Deaths == * Year 1 of {{ill|Kannin|en|Kannin|qid=Q1193951|lt=Kannin|1=Kannin}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 6|en|July 6|qid=Q2695|lt=July 6|1=July 6}} , {{ill|1017|en|1017|qid=Q19249|lt=1017|1=1017}} ) – {{ill|Genshin|en|Genshin|qid=Q1009263|lt=Genshin|1=Genshin}} (Eshin Sōzu), Tendai Buddhist monk (b. {{ill|942|en|942|qid=Q23740|lt=942|1=942}} ) * Year 3 of {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 25|en|July 25|qid=Q2720|lt=July 25|1=July 25}} , {{ill|1863|en|1863|qid=Q7701|lt=1863|1=1863}} ) – {{ill|Ogata Kōan|en|Ogata Kōan|qid=Q1187045|lt=Ogata Kōan|1=Ogata Kōan}} , scholar of Western studies and physician (b. {{ill|1810|en|1810|qid=Q6922|lt=1810|1=1810}} )
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|6|9|6|11|5|10|7|6|0610|qq=}}
